step_1_context.text: I can swim now, and when I was six I could swim only short distances.

step_2_explanation.simple_rule: Use can for present ability/permission and could for past ability or polite requests.

step_3_interactive_exercises.question: Choose the correct sentence.
step_3_interactive_exercises.explanation_for_failure: Can/could are followed by base verb without 'to'.

step_3_interactive_exercises.error_analysis: After modal verbs, use the base form directly.
